name: Video Overlay 9:16
description: Transparent 9:16 overlay layers for vertical video compositing. Safe zones tuned for YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels.
author: overlay-system

slots.label: Eyebrow label
slots.description: Short uppercase tag above the headline.

slots.label: Content position
slots.description: Placement: safe-top (default), safe-bottom, safe-center, safe-left, safe-right. All positions respect platform UI safe zones.

slots.label: Lower-third mode
slots.description: Set to any value (e.g. 'yes') to render as a lower-third bar above the platform UI zone. Overrides position.

slots.label: Accent color
slots.description: Color for rules, labels, decorative elements.

slots.label: Image / logo
slots.description: Small image (logo, avatar) displayed with text. Rendered as a circle.
